arts.ttl: Predicted Holstein Kiel v Borussia Dortmund Xis
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund will be without Donyell Malen for their Bundesliga game against Holstein Kiel on Tuesday night. The Dutchman is closing in on a move away from the club with…

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund fans deliver Donyell Malen verdict after he agrees £22m move to Aston Villa
Another player now set for Aston Villa medical along with Donyell Malen after £6.7m fee agreed - journalist
Chelsea attacker 'in talks' over potential Borussia Dortmund loan switch amid Stamford Bridge struggles
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly in talks with Borussia Dortmund over the loan signing of Carney Chukwuemeka, who is struggling for first-team opportunities at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: BVB’s Rückrunde Off to Poor Start Against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Inside 30 seconds, Gregor Kobel played Dortmund into trouble, Yan Couto failed to deal with it, and Leverkusen pounced upon his soft clearance for Nathan Tella's brilliant opener. In the second half, Schick missed a glorious opportunity to grab himself a hat-trick, and Dortmund reduced the deficit to one goal through a Guirassy penalty, but Leverkusen saw the game out for all three points.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 3rd & Dortmund 5th - Which clubs have made most money in January since 2000?
arts.sum: It’s been a relatively slow start to the January transfer window but business is expected to gather pace over the coming weeks. Marcus Rashford is destined to leave Manchester...

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund begin talks with Chelsea to sign Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have begun talks with Chelsea over the signing of Carney Chukwuemeka on loan, according to Florian Plettenberg. Dortmund are keen on signing the attacking midfielder and initial discussions…

arts.ttl: Holstein Kiel vs Borussia Dortmund preview: Hosts looking to ambush an ailing and depleted BVB
arts.sum: With several absentees missing in their defeat to Bayer Leverkusen last Friday, Nuri Şahin’s BVB make the trip north with a squad light on personnel which will boost Kiel’s hopes of causing an almighty upset.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: 'Fee agreed' for Borussia Dortmund attacker
arts.sum: Aston Villa have reportedly made the breakthrough in their efforts to secure a deal for a Netherlands international.

arts.ttl: Dortmund in race for Manchester United winger as Malen replacement
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund are still in the race to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United after talks with the player’s representatives last week. Sporting director Sebastian Kehl held a meeting with Rashford’s camp in Germany last week to discuss the prospect of signing the 27-year-old. However, Sky Germany are reporting that a deal remains ‘very difficult’. […] The post Dortmund in race for Manchester United winger as Malen replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.
